task_snapshots.title: 369-02 — Adaptive Metric Weights System
task_snapshots.description:
Implement adaptive weight adjustment in src/bernstein/evolution/governance.py. Create EvolutionWeights dataclass with default weights (test_coverage, lint_score, type_safety, performance, security, maintainability). Implement adjust_weights(project_context: dict) -> EvolutionWeights that:
1. Summarizes project metrics (current test coverage, lint score, recent failures, codebase size, active areas)
2. Queries the planning LLM: "Given this project state, which metrics should be weighted higher next cycle?"
3. Parses LLM response and returns adjusted EvolutionWeights
4. Logs weight changes to .sdd/metrics/evolution_weights.jsonl with timestamp and reason

Tests in test_governance.py: weight adjustment logic, LLM response parsing, JSONL logging, edge cases. Ensure .sdd/metrics/ directory is created. All tests pass.

[subtask of 53e205b6e23e]
